notes: Each case was reviewed from the application Drawing Review UI screenshot with same-name reference drawing on the left and generated drawing on the right.
Structured API/QC fields are supporting context only and did not override the visual screenshot judgement.
The screenshots show the generated drawings still do not match the learned LB26001 drafting standard.
